---
title: "The Face of Carlyon and Other Stories"
---

## The Face of Carlyon and Other Stories

**Author:** Christabel Rose Coleridge
**Date:** 1875
**Imprint:** London: Mozley and Smith

### Notes

The title story was originally published in <i>MP</i> (November 1873-February 1874).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
